headings.usage: Use high-contrast Playfair Display. Accent words (like 'Every time.' or 'Delivered') should be set in italic and green (#1F5C3A).

body.usage: Clean readable sans-serif for body text, forms, and smaller labels.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1F5C3A] text-white rounded-full hover:bg-[#16452B] transition-colors px-8 py-3.5 font-medium
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#1F5C3A] text-[#1F5C3A] bg-transparent rounded-full hover:bg-[#1F5C3A]/5 transition-colors px-8 py-3.5 font-medium

cards.problem: bg-[#F4DCD4] rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-4
cards.solution: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm border border-[#1F5C3A]/10 flex flex-col gap-4

badges.primary: inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm border border-[#1F5C3A]/10 rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-[#1F5C3A] shadow-sm

hero.description: Premium burlap sack of rice on a rustic table with a Malawian family in the background.

delivery.description: Cheerful Malawian motorbike delivery driver delivering premium rice.

products.description: Bags of food in the market.

attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid='role-based-name'

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORTANT: Do not use placeholders for images. Use the provided image URLs.
Use Playfair Display for all headings. For accent words (like 'Every time.' in the solution section or 'Delivered' in the hero), use italic and primary green color.
Set the overall page background to #FAF3EC (warm cream).
For the Problem section cards, strictly use the dusty terracotta color #F4DCD4 with icon tint #C44D2E inside light square tiles.
For the Solution section, use a split layout with a checklist on the left and 4 white cards on the right.
Implement the 'Order Now' flow: users select products and fill a form, which saves to DB and redirects to WhatsApp via api/whatsapp.
Ensure the hero section features a badge 'Every bag helps keep girls in school' with an ochre icon #C5953E.
Buttons must be pill-shaped. Cards should be soft-rounded (rounded-2xl) with subtle shadows.
Use Manrope for body font and forms.
Ensure accessibility: maintain high contrast ratios for all text.
